{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323144530E4D80BB5EDD90068C7B3\"}"},"total":9},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7524133100337578776","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"此书堪比其它武侠小说，非常好"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1751858798,"group_id":"7516487126024735806","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxvOEn+FetMvEw+NX0TirgsqOgnFeR0/K9bz2b/Rd4eR","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1599167528441580","user_name":"纳木错的钩弋夫人"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1599167528441580","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7516487126024735806","book_info":{"abstract":"大唐武则天年间，天下武林大乱，为了门派之争，展开了你死我活的争斗。多年未出世的老魔头重出江湖，失传百年的绝世武功再现武林。在此期间，少侠李凌霄横空出世。他自幼受三位异人传授，习得一身盖世武功。为了武林安宁，为了国泰民安，他不顾个人安危，与武林黑恶势力展开了生死搏斗。他凭着高超的武艺和机智的头脑，在武林正义人士的帮助下，终于铲除了以东方一剑为首的黑恶势力。使武林得以安宁，国家得以太平。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2703689134ff91dd82429c57d8c34c6c","author":"小神侠","author_id":"","book_id":"7516487126024735806","book_name":"神剑怪侠","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0b098","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3471人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":1140,\"name\":\"东方仙侠\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140\u0026name=东方仙侠\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":7,\"name\":\"玄幻\",\"schema\":
